text:
Based in Cambridge at the heart of the UK芒聙聶s world-leading life sciences sector, Applied Concepts helps start-up or established clients in medtech, biotechnology and industrial fields to develop innovative and robust embedded systems that will power tomorrow芒聙聶s state of the art devices. Early stage concept development With broad expertise in both electronics hardware and software, we specialise in transforming ideas into proof of concept prototypes. Technologies and tools Hardware design 芒聙聯 Analog and digital. In-vitro diagnostics, microfluidics control, mechatronics. Video capture and transmission. Arm MCU, FPGA. C, MISRA-C, C++, C#. IEEE 802.11 WiFi, BTLE. MQTT IoT. Hard Real-time : Bare metal / RTOS (VxWorks, 脦录C/OS-II, Free RTOS). Test-Driven design. Static analysis. Industry standard tools : Linux, Windows, IAR, Altium, git, Jira, CUnit, Azure DevOps, TeamCity. Process We understand the importance of process and adherence to stringent safety and reliability standards in medical devices and integrate with our clients芒聙聶 own processes and Quality Management Systems as necessary. ISO 9001  QMS ISO 13485 Medical Devices IEC 62304 Medical device software Design History File Contact Applied Concepts Ltd The Old Piggery 1 Sheepshead Lane, Harston Cambridgeshire
